title: Sand and Sky
editorialSummary: Major deserts sorted by continent: African (Sahara, Namib, Kalahari, Danakil), Asian (Gobi, Arabian, Karakum, Thar), American (Atacama, Sonoran, Patagonian, Chihuahuan), and polar/cold (Antarctic, Arctic, Great Basin, Taklamakan). Each desert is unambiguously on one continent.

meta.gptRationale: Several deserts are well known, but the geography test becomes tricky once less famous regions and cold-desert classification enter the mix.
